title: Work Item (Data Backbone)
description: Lightweight canonical work item record used by the artifact_emitter helper and the data backbone. Separate from the full governance work-item schema in schemas/work-item.schema.json.

work_item_id.description: Unique identifier for the work item.

source_artifact_id.description: artifact_id of the evaluation result that triggered this work item.

status.description: Current status of the work item.

priority.description: Priority level of the work item.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this work item was created.

resolution_notes.description: Free-text notes explaining resolution. Required when status=resolved.
